title: Windchill: Access Control
description: Compare access control priorities and define rules for user interactions with information in Windchill. Define access control schema using domain policies, ad hoc access, and security labels.

modules.title: Access Control Strategies
modules.description: Examine three primary strategies for user access in Windchill, compare access control priorities, and review the Windchill domain architecture.

modules.title: Domain Policies and Rules
modules.description: Define domain access control rules using five components, manage participants and permissions, and understand ACL resolution principles.

modules.title: Folder Domains and Advanced Permissions
modules.description: Create folder domains, understand permissions for move and lifecycle operations, and define notification and indexing policies.

modules.title: Ad Hoc Access and Secure Collaboration
modules.description: Grant ad hoc access to individual objects, troubleshoot access control issues, and implement security labels and agreements for secure collaboration.
